_comment: Ground truth for the seeded demo repo. Eval matches predicted findings on (file, cwe, line). Keep line numbers in sync with the source files.

findings.note: Cross-file; Semgrep CE single-file taint cannot follow this — requires L1 call graph + L2 walk or the custom inter-proc taint worklist.

planted_false_positives.reason: Parameterized query (cur.execute(sql, (username,))). A naive matcher that flags any cur.execute() will report this. L4 MUST drop it. Counts as a false positive if reported.
